name: TD Setup 1 — Standard
description: A series of 9 or more consecutive closes compared to the close 4 bars earlier

buy_setup.initialization: prior bar close must be >= close[4] to start the count
buy_setup.completion: 9 consecutive closes each less than the close 4 bars earlier

hiccup_rally.description: A reflex rally tends to occur after setup completion
hiccup_rally.condition: bar 8 or bar 9 close must be less than bar 6 and bar 7 close

sell_setup.initialization: prior bar close must be <= close[4] to start the count
sell_setup.completion: 9 consecutive closes each greater than the close 4 bars earlier

hiccup_decline.description: A reflex decline tends to occur after setup completion
hiccup_decline.condition: bar 8 or bar 9 close must be greater than bar 6 and bar 7 close

tdst.description: TD Setup Trend — the extreme price level of the prior Setup in the opposite direction
tdst.continuation_signal: current setup closes beyond the TDST level of the prior opposite setup — trend likely continues to Countdown
tdst.reversal_signal: current setup fails to close beyond TDST level — price reversal likely before Countdown completes
